add_library(traycon STATIC traycon.c)
target_include_directories(traycon PUBLIC ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR})

add_library(thirdparty::traycon ALIAS traycon)

if (CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Linux")
    find_package(PkgConfig REQUIRED)
    if (NOT TRAYCON_NO_SNI)
        pkg_check_modules(DBUS REQUIRED dbus-1)
        target_include_directories(traycon PRIVATE ${DBUS_INCLUDE_DIRS})
        target_link_libraries(traycon PRIVATE ${DBUS_LIBRARIES})
        target_compile_options(traycon PRIVATE ${DBUS_CFLAGS_OTHER})
    else()
        target_compile_definitions(traycon PUBLIC TRAYCON_NO_SNI)
    endif()

    if (NOT TRAYCON_NO_X11)
        pkg_check_modules(X11 REQUIRED x11)
        target_include_directories(traycon PRIVATE ${X11_INCLUDE_DIRS})
        target_link_libraries(traycon PRIVATE ${X11_LIBRARIES})
        target_compile_options(traycon PRIVATE ${X11_CFLAGS_OTHER})
    else()
        target_compile_definitions(traycon PUBLIC TRAYCON_NO_X11)
    endif()
elseif (CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Darwin")
    set_source_files_properties(traycon.c PROPERTIES COMPILE_OPTIONS "-x;objective-c")
    target_link_libraries(traycon PRIVATE "-framework Cocoa")
elseif (CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Windows")
    target_link_libraries(traycon PRIVATE shell32 user32 gdi32)
endif()
